programme.title: Making It Home With Kortney & Kenny
programme.desc: Michael decides to transfer back to Nashville, so he purchases a house for his family with three objectives in mind; a yard, a ranch with a basement and a place to play basketball, but to Emily's chagrin, that's all this house has.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Social media star Keith Lee brings a taste of his New Orleans Food Festival to the Tam Fam; Viral California pitmaster Walter Johnson; tasting festival favorites, including banana pudding from Janel Prator's "The Puddery"; Flagboy Giz performs.

programme.desc: A family of six has to have special accommodations for a son's accessibility needs, while wanting to have enough space to host large family holiday parties; Drew and Jonathan give the family the best Christmas yet.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Two moms open up about the guilt they feel for not always wanting to play with their children; certified conscious parenting coach Reem Raouda shares how parents can stay present with their kids without losing themselves; psychologist Chanda Reynolds discusses how kids can preserve their individuality while sharing rooms with siblings; public health educator Dorian Johnson on raising resilient, healthy kids.

programme.title: Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Two moms open up about the guilt they feel for not always wanting to play with their children; certified conscious parenting coach Reem Raouda shares how parents can stay present with their kids without losing themselves; psychologist Chanda Reynolds discusses how kids can preserve their individuality while sharing rooms with siblings; public health educator Dorian Johnson on raising resilient, healthy kids.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A mother of two who is a veteran and a cancer survivor purchases a home that is far from perfect; Drew and Jonathan help overhaul the space to transform the house into a balanced sanctuary.

programme.title: Crime Beat
programme.desc: Looking into some of Canada's most infamous criminal cases with extensive archives and intimate family interviews and exploring the lasting impacts on the community and justice system.

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. Joining Colbert is his bandleader, Julliard-trained Jon Batiste, and house band Stay Human. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show.".

programme.title: The Late Show With Stephen Colbert
programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show. Following the genre's classic formula, each show kicks off with a monologue and a look at recent headlines, and features sketch comedy, celebrity interviews and musical performances. Joining Colbert is his bandleader, Julliard-trained Jon Batiste, and house band Stay Human. The show is filmed in New York's famed Ed Sullivan Theater, the longtime home of "The Late Show.".
